# rh-ssg-formatting

Red Hat SSG review for formatting: code blocks (one command per step, bold
via `subs="+quotes"`, separate input/output), user-replaced values (angle
brackets, italics, underscores), sentence-style title capitalization, product
name/version attributes (not hard-coded), date formats ("3 October 2019"),
single-step-procedure bullets, non-breaking spaces in "Red Hat", and man-page
references. Checklist-driven, no CLI arguments; composed by
`docs-review-style`.

**Plugin**: [docs-skills](index.md) | **:material-check: User-invocable**

## Usage

```bash
Review this Red Hat doc for code-block and placeholder formatting
```
